eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Yakima, WA; at 1:35 PM on MAR 25, 2019 Effective until 2:35 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for Yakima County, Washington.  This system would bring you emergency alerts during an emergency.
